403.description: Simulated/stub adapter — artifact download not allowed (code BACKUP_ARTIFACT_NOT_DOWNLOADABLE_SIMULATED)

409.description: Backup run has not completed successfully

UserInfo.description: User profile and auth context. GET /api/Auth/me returns permissions from the same effective source as JWT permission claims (IRolePermissionResolver). Tenant fields mirror the effective tenant (JWT tenant_id claim when valid, otherwise the seeded default tenant). Branch fields remain null until branch context exists.

appContext.description: Client app from JWT (pos, admin), when present.

tenantId.description: Effective tenant id (canonical GUID string). Issued on new JWTs and returned by /me when resolved.

tenantDisplayName.description: tenants.Name for the effective tenant when the row exists; otherwise null.

branchId.description: Reserved; null until branch context is implemented.

branchDisplayName.description: Reserved; null until branch context is implemented.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"
Bearer.name: Authorization
